meaning: n.为了...之好处,出于对...的兴趣,缘故,理由,日本米酒
examples: You can do it. Please, for my sake.
They stayed together for the sake of the children.
The food at Azalea is luxurious (sake-marinated Chilean sea bass with shrimp dumplings), the ambience hip.
For the sake of keeping things simple, we'll stick to the models that seem truly promising.
